task1.title: Table: International Students in Four English-speaking Countries
task1.prompt:
The table below shows the number of international students from different regions studying in four English-speaking countries.

Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

Write at least 150 words.

task2.title: Opinion: The Most Important Aim of Science
task2.prompt:
The most important aim of science should be to improve people's lives.

To what extent do you agree or disagree with this statement?

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

Write at least 250 words.
